relations.subject: Green-tailed warbler
relations.evidence: The nominate subspecies of the green-tailed warbler is found in the highlands of central Hispaniola that span the border between Haiti and the Dominican Republic, though it is found almost entirely in the latter country

relations.evidence: The main potential threats are continuing habitat destruction and predation by introduced small Indian mongooses. It is considered locally common
